description: A compliance crisis is unfolding at Pinnacle Healthcare Systems, one of Meridian Technology Partners' most critical accounts. Escalate the support ticket 'HIPAA audit finding - unencrypted backups' to Priority 'Urgent', Severity 'Critical', and Status 'In Progress'. Update the deal 'Pinnacle EHR Security Upgrade' to the 'Negotiation/Review' sales stage with a probability of 75 and an expected close date of 2026-05-31. Schedule a meeting for the Pinnacle Healthcare Systems account with the subject 'HIPAA Emergency Remediation - Pinnacle Healthcare' for 2026-03-15 from 09:00 to 11:00, status 'Planned', at 'Video Conference - Zoom'. Login to Vtiger CRM at http://localhost:8000 using credentials admin / password.
